titleStmt.title: SII 18.109: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 109. (B.K. No. 177 of 1933-34.) KAṆṆŪR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the Bhajana-maṭha.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalla, is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 37, Nandana, Pushya, śu. 12, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa The date is irregular. The tithi cited corresponds to A.D. 1112, December 31. The week-day was Tuesday and not Sunday as given in the record; nor did the saṁkramaṇa occur on that day.

It records a grant of land made by Mahāsāmantādhipati Kāḷidāsa-Daṇḍanāyaka to the temple of Pārśvanātha, constructed by Bijji-seṭṭi at Kannavuri. Arhaṇandi Beṭṭadadēva of Keṇḍakund-ānvaya, Mūlā-saṁgha, Dēsi-gaṇa, Pustaka-gachchha and Piriya-samudāya and belonging to the spiritual lineage of Koṇḍakoṇḍāchārya, is stated to be the Guru of Bijjidēva. Kāḷidāsa is stated to be governing Kannavuri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁcchanaṁ jīyātraiḷōkyanāthasya śāsa
naṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahā
rājādhirājaṁ paramēsvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
kyābharaṇaṁ [.] śrīmattribhuvanamallaniḷāmahitaṁ nahuṣaprithubha
gīrathacaritaṁ bhūmaṇḍaḷamaṁ sakaḷāsāmaṇḍaḷamavadhiyappinaṁ sā
dhisidaṁ . vritta . Uḍenūlēḷuṁ kaḍaltunneseva jasame pūmāle tārācaḷaṁ
kannaḍi gaṁgāsindhumuktāvaḷi sakaḷa diṣādhīśaroldajjagōpaṁgeḍegoṇḍi
rddajjarātmāṁgane vasudhegenalśōḍaṣōrvvipariṁ nūrmmaḍiyādaṁ sā
rvvabhaumōnnatiya mahimeyiṁ vikramādityadēvaṁ . tatpādapadmōpa
jīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabdamahāsāma(ṁ)ntādhipati mahāpra
caṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ . ka . Abhivarṇnise bhuvanajanaṁ prabhumaṁtrō
tsāhaśaktiyiṁ taḷedirddaṁ tribhuvanamallana sāmrājyabhāramaṁ
kāḷidāsadaṇḍādhīśaṁ . parapuramaṁ kōpāgniyinuripuva besade
ḍege pavanasutanaṁ rāmaṁ karevaṁ cāḷukyarāmaṁ karevaṁ kalikāḷidāsa
daṇḍādhipanaṁ . kaṁ . hatipalamāraṁ nāḍaṁ pratipattiyanīye vikra
māṁkaṁ sēnāpati kāḷidāsanatyūrjjitaśauryyaṁ kannavuriyanāḷu
ttirddaṁ . kaṁ . Ā daṇḍanāthatiḷakaṁ rōdasthaḷamaṁ yaśassuvāsāga
ramācchādise pārśvajinēśvarapādārccane māḍi bhūmidānaṁge
ydaṁ . svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 37 neya nandanasaṁ
vatsarada pusya sudhdha 12 Ādivāradandinuttarāyaṇasaṁkrama
ṇaparvvanimittaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvargge binnapaṁgeydu kanna
vuriyalu tribhōgābhyantara sahita bijjiseṭṭi māḍisida śrī
pārśvanāthadēvargge biṭṭa kariyanela māṇikēśvarada kōla mattaHere the letters śānti were first written and then struck off.
ru 2ḷa tōṁṭa 1 nivēśaṇa 2 gāṇa 1 © Ī dēvara keymaneyaṁ kā
da mahāpuruṣanō sadugaṁgeya taḍiyoḷgōdāna kōṭiyaṁ ko
ṭṭa poreyaṁ kiḍisidātanavanaḷidātaṁ . caturaṁguḷacāraṇa
suddhi tamage samanisidudenipa tapadunnatiyiṁ śrutadiṁ bhūma
ṇḍaḷaviśrutaranisidaralte koṇḍakoṇḍācāryaru . vacana .
Ā koṇḍakundānvayada śrīmūlasaṁghada dēsigaṇada pustakagaccha
da piriya samudāyadācāryyavaryyaru . vimaḷaśrautaṁ kai
valyameṁba saṁkalpaminitenerggiṟiyaṁ viśvamanaṟiva mahimeyiṁ
varddhamānajinapatige varddhamānamunīṁdra . Ā munīṁdrapādārādha
kaṁ . Āravindasmēramāsyaṁ tiḷide hridayasaṁśuddhiyaṁ mānasaṁ śānta
rasādhīnaṁ samādhānamanaṟipe tapastaptamuttaptakārttasvaraśākhā
līḷayaṁ pāḷise tanu nayanaṁ kāppuraṁ māḍe kāruṇyarasaśrautaṁga
ḷaṁ lōkamaneṟagisidaṁ cāḷacandrabratīṁdraṁ . pracurakaḷānvitarakuṭi
ḷacaṁcaḷarssuddhapakṣavrittarddōṣāpacayaprakāśarene bāḷacandra
dēvaprabhāvamēnaccariyō . Ā munipasantānadoḷāsāmukhamaṁ baḷa
se nijatapōvibhavasamuddāmayaśaṁ pesarvvaḍedaṁ kāmāṁtakanarha
ṇandibeṭṭadadēvaṁ . māgiya darppamaṁ kiḍisi bēsageyaṁ bedaṟaṭṭi mīṟiThe letter ḍi is written below the line.
mēghāgamamaṁ trikāḷaniyamasthitiyiṁ paramātmayōgadoḷ
yōgigaḷinnarārenisi beṭṭadadēvara māḷkeyiṁ tapaśrīgadhinātha
nāgi jinaśāsanadīpakanādoḍoppuguṁ . gu�gaḷene madha
nagajakēsariyenisirddharhaṇandi beṭṭadadēvarccaritārtthaṁ samyaktvada
pariṇatiyiṁ bijjaṇaṁ janastutanādaṁ . Ī bhuvanaṁ pogaḷe vineyā
bharaṇaṁ bijjaṇaṁ suśīḷabratakēḷībhavananādanāhārābhayabhaiśa
jyaśāstradānavinōdaṁ . paḍeda dhanaṁ parārththadeḍegādadu
pātradoḷannadānamaṁ kuḍuveḍegādudī sakaḷabhavyasamūha
vipadviśāḷamaṁ kiḍipeḍegādudu jināyatanakke jinēṁ
drapūjegeṁdaḍe kritakrityanaṁ pogaḷadirppude bijjananī jagajja
naṁ . kulamaṁ pavitra jinamaṁdiramaṁ mā
paramārtthaA few
Digital edition of SII 18.109 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
